title: 菊花賞の後に・生来の強運

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright manages to beat
Matikanefukukitaru and wins the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She has proven that she can run long-distance
races as well as medium. However, this also means
we now have to decide on which category to
focus on.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We decide Mejiro Bright should compete in the
Stayers Stakes as another test of her potential as
a stayer.
